nasb.text: Then they sent and called him, and Jeroboam and all the assembly of Israel came and spoke to Rehoboam, saying,

esv.text: And they sent and called him, and Jeroboam and all the assembly of Israel came and said to Rehoboam,

cnv.text: 以色列人就派遣人去請他來，於是耶羅波安和以色列全體會眾都來見羅波安，告訴他說：

ccb.text: 以色列人派人去请他，他就和以色列会众去见罗波安，说：
